nodes.title: Likeness Tip:
widgets_values:
For best results, try to use images where the character has the same hairstyle, the same make-up, and looks like it was taken on the same day.

The "Starting Shot" image will influence the type of environment and the look of the character the most.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: deformed, contortion, cripple, broken, grotesque, weird, horror, conjoined, twins, talking, chattering
Keep running different seeds of the Low Resolution 1st Pass, until you find a seed you like. Don't worry about the character likeness on the low resolution pass, it will be boosted on the 2nd pass.
Queue this Preview Image node to force the cropping nodes to activate so that you can see what you're doing.

widgets_values: Good luck recombining all frames without running out of system RAM. If somebody finds a way to do this, let me know.
The model was trained to run at 2x speed, so that it can be interpolated back to normal speed. This allows for a longer generation with less resource costs.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: A woman appears in various scenes, each scene cuts to the next scene featuring the same woman. After she removes her clothes, she appears completely naked, and she poses nude with her breasts visible and her vagina can be seen between her legs. Different scenes feature the same woman in a variety of poses, where she stands, turns, walks, sits, kneels, leans forward, bends over, lies on her back, lies on her side, lies on her stomach, leans back and spreads her legs open, lays on her back with her legs open. The scenes feature the same woman from different focal lengths, such as wide shots, medium shots, and close-up shots of the same subject. The view changes between scenes to show the same subject from different angles such as medium-angle, low-angle and high angle view. She is alone. The environment is a bedroom

nodes.title: Prompting Notes
widgets_values:
1st Part:

A woman appears in various scenes, each scene cuts to the next scene featuring the same woman. After she removes her clothes, she appears completely naked, and she poses nude with her breasts visible and her vagina can be seen between her legs. Different scenes feature the same woman in a variety of poses, where she

2nd part can be a selection or combination of these options: where she stands, turns, walks, spins around, sits, kneels, stands on her knees, crawls, leans back, leans forward, bends over, poses in front of a mirror, lies on her back, lies on her side, lies on her stomach, sits with her legs up, leans forward, leans back and spreads her legs open, gets down on her hands and knees, lays on her back with her legs open.

3rd part stays the same:
The scenes feature the same woman from different focal lengths, such as wide shots, medium shots, and close-up shots of the same subject. The view changes between scenes to show the same subject from different angles such as medium-angle, low-angle and high angle view.

Adding "She is alone." helps if background characters become an issue.

The last part is important to get a consistent scene:
The environment is ...

You have a lot of control over what the environment will be with the last sentence.

nodes.title: Size Guide
widgets_values:
Size guide:

Low Resolution 1st phase size options:
128 x 192
256 x 384
320 x 480
384 x 576

High Resolution 2nd phase size options:
512 x 768
640 x 960
768 x 1152
896 x 1344
1024 x 1536
1152 x 1728
1280 x 1920

The high resolution pass is needed to boost the likeness of the character. Best results at 1280x1920.

Tip: If you see unwanted hallucinations in the low res phase, you can choose to run only the frames where there are no mistakes, eg. Batch 1 (frames 0-64) Batch 2 (frames 64-128) Batch 3 (frames 128-192) or Batch 4 (frames 192-256)

Tip: If you get weird genitals on the 2nd Phase, either add a genital lora to that batch's pipeline, or decrease the Denoise value in the sampler settings for that batch
